FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class LinedFlowLayout

Namespace
FluentGpu.Scene
Assembly
FluentGpu.Scene.dll

WinUI LinedFlowLayout — the ItemsView photo-wall: items flow left-to-right into uniform-height LINES, each item's width = its aspect ratio × LineHeight; a line wraps when the next item would overflow the cross size. Uniform line stride keeps windowing O(1); the per-item line table is (re)built lazily ONLY when (itemCount, crossSize) change — realize/arrange calls stay allocation-free per the seam contract. WinUI defaults: LineSpacing 0, MinItemSpacing 0 (LinedFlowLayout.h:25,27 s_defaultLineSpacing/s_defaultMinItemSpacing); LineHeight has no auto here (WinUI s_defaultLineHeight = NaN = auto-from-first-item; the engine takes it explicitly). Items wider than the cross size clamp to it (single-item line). STATEFUL — create once and reuse.

public sealed class LinedFlowLayout : IVirtualLayout

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
